name: Delete Project UI
summary: Confirmation dialog UI for project deletion with safety prompts
goals: Prevent accidental project deletion with a confirmation dialog
Clearly communicate the consequences of deletion

specDetail.description: A ConfirmDialog component that prompts the user to confirm project deletion. Requires typing the project name or clicking a confirmation button. Shows warning about irreversible data loss.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: ID of the project to delete

parameters.name: onConfirm
parameters.description: Callback invoked when deletion is confirmed

parameters.name: onCancel
parameters.description: Callback invoked when deletion is cancelled

constraints: Must require explicit user confirmation (cannot be triggered accidentally)
Must display a clear warning about data loss
Must disable the confirm button until user acknowledges the warning

acceptanceCriteria.then: the user must explicitly confirm before deletion proceeds

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
